results.justification: EXACT TWIN — sequential per-segment agent communication with summary handoff IS the panel-by-panel narrative cascade in PAJ-NTAUB-PANEL.

Explicit panel-based serialized narrative with cross-panel conditioning IS the panel-cascade structure of PAJ-NTAUB-PANEL.
